name: George Michael
bio: George Michael retains a valuable catalog through enduring pop recognition, steady streaming, and recurring sync or nostalgia-driven discovery.
notable_for: Soulful pop songwriting with unusually durable crossover catalog value.
career_highlight: Core singles from the 1980s and 1990s continue to anchor long-tail earnings decades later.
revenue_drivers: Global catalog streaming keeps his biggest songs commercially active.
Playlist familiarity and seasonal or nostalgia listening support repeat demand.
Film, television, and retrospective programming help renew catalog attention.
